content.json.content:
{
  "name": "Sergio Marin",
  "nick_name": "highercomve",
  "tagline": "Senior software engineer specialized in web applications, from APIs to the front-end",
  "location": "Santiago, Chile",
  "networks": [
    {
      "title": "Sergio Marin's Github page",
      "url": "https://github.com/highercomve",
      "icon": "github"
    },
    {
      "title": "Sergio Marin's Gitlab page",
      "url": "https://gitlab.com/highercomve",
      "icon": "gitlab"
    },
    {
      "title": "Sergio Marin's LinkedIn page",
      "url": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/highercomve/",
      "icon": "linkedin-in"
    },
    {
      "title": "Sergio Marin's Medium blog",
      "url": "https://medium.com/@highercomve",
      "icon": "medium"
    },
    {
      "title": "Sergio Marin's Twitter",
      "url": "https://twitter.com/highercomve",
      "icon": "twitter"
    }
  ],
  "about_me": {
    "title": "",
    "content": [
      "I started programming more than a decade ago by digging into the open-source PHP code of a game server for an MMORPG. Taking it apart to understand how it worked turned into a lasting fascination with software and the web.",
      "Since then I've built my career around the web platform. I like it because it reaches people instantly, on any device or operating system, with nothing to install — which makes it a great place to solve real problems and ship things people actually use.",
      "Over the years I've worked across the whole stack: designing and building APIs, dynamic front-end applications, and server-rendered apps, along with data processing and integrations with third-party services.",
      "I treat every project as a chance to learn. The web moves fast, and I enjoy keeping up with it — picking up new tools and sharpening my craft as I go."
    ],
    "wrapper": "p"
  },
  "aims": {
    "title": "My aims?",
    "content": [
  "Keep leveling up — go deep on the tools and ideas actually worth mastering",
  "Find sharper ways to build, not just the familiar ones",
  "Make the whole team better through mentoring and honest collaboration",
  "Ship work that outlives me — clean, documented, and ready for whoever's next"
],
    "wrapper": "li"
  },
  "skils": {
    "title": "Technical skills",
    "content": [
      "Golang",
      "Javascript",
      "Kubernetes",
      "Docker",
      "Node.js",
      "Linux",
      "Bash",
      "Apache",
      "Nginx",
      "Git",
      "React",
      "Vue.js",
      "State management libraries",
      "Web Components",
      "Ruby",
      "Amazon web services",
      "Front-end automatization tools",
      "HTML / CSS",
      "MySQL",
      "MongoDB",
      "PostgreSQL"
    ],
    "wrapper": "li"
  },
  "talks": {
    "title": "Talks",
    "content": [
      "La Plata JS - December 2018 (http://slides.com/highercomve/web-components). The current state of the web components in the browser, and how we can use them today."
    ],
    "wrapper": "li"
  }
}
